revision.text: [[User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}]] {{toolbar|separator=dot | [[User talk:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|contribs]] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} blocks] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/protect|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} protections] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/delete|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} deletions] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/move|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} moves] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/rights|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/renameuser|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} renames] | [{{fullurl:m:Special:Log/gblrename|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} global renames] }}<!-- {{bureaucrat2}} --><noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
[[User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}]] {{toolbar|separator=dot | [[User talk:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|contribs]] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} blocks] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/protect|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} protections] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/delete|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} deletions] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/move|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} moves] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/rights|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/renameuser|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} renames] | [{{fullurl:m:Special:Log/gblrename|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} global renames] }}<!-- {{bureaucrat2}} --><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bureaucrat2 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bureaucrat2 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> [[User:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}]] {{toolbar|separator=dot | [[User talk:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|talk]] | [[Special:Contributions/{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}|contribs]] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/block|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} blocks] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/protect|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} protections] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/delete|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} deletions] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/move|user={{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}} moves] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/rights|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} rights] | [{{fullurl:Special:Log/renameuser|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} renames] | [{{fullurl:m:Special:Log/gblrename|user={{ucfirst:{{urlencode:{{{User|{{{1}}}}}}}}}}}} global renames] }}<!-- {{bureaucrat2}} --><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
